sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11599" key="a)pasxolhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπασχολ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n11599.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must be engrossed,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βιωτικαῖς πράξεσι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
